prompt.name: Coherence Phase 25 -- S25.2 策略切换
prompt.sub_stage_name: composer.compose() 接收 self_eval, 切换后即时重建 payload
prompt.role: compose() 新增 self_eval 参数。策略无效时切换 action_type 并重建 payload。 注意: 切换必须在 domain_passport/fusor/tax 处理之前, 否则 payload 中会残留原 action_type 的字段。
prompt.context:
compose() 执行顺序: 1. _select_action_type + _build_payload (约第 48 行) 2. TTM 粗筛 + SDT 微调 + Flow 定难度 (约第 63-95 行) 3. Domain Passport + Fusor + Tax (约第 97-110 行) 4. return action
策略切换应在步骤 2 之后、步骤 3 之前执行。 这样切换后的 action_type 会经过 passport/fusor/tax 的校验。
约束: - 只修改 src/coach/composer.py - self_eval 为 None 时行为零变化 - 全量回归 1294+ 必须通过
prompt.task:
-- 改动 1: compose() 方法签名新增 self_eval 参数 --
def compose( self, user_state: dict | None = None, intent: str = "", relevant: list[dict] | None = None, excursion_mode: bool = False, ttm_strategy: dict | None = None, sdt_profile: dict | None = None, flow_result: dict | None = None, self_eval: dict | None = None, # Phase 25 ) -> dict:
-- 改动 2: 在 Flow 定难度(约第 95 行)之后、Domain Passport(约第 97 行)之前插入 --
# Phase 25: 策略无效时切换教学模式 if self_eval and self_eval.get("strategy_ineffective"): current = action_type switch_map = { "scaffold": "probe", "challenge": "scaffold", "probe": "reflect", "suggest": "scaffold", } switched = switch_map.get(current) if switched and switched != current: action_type = switched payload = self._build_payload(action_type, intent)

success_criteria.item: self_eval=None 时 compose() 行为不变
切换后 payload 重建正确(不含原 action_type 残留字段)
切换后的 action_type 经过 domain_passport/fusor/tax 校验
